goal: Create functional 24/7 cloud agents from the existing Houston agent creation flow, using real houston-engine containers and subscription entitlements.

phases.name: Control plane foundation
phases.exitGate: Authenticated user can read entitlements and cloud agent list.

phases.name: Docker runtime on VPS
phases.exitGate: Creating a cloud agent starts a private houston-engine container with a persistent volume.

phases.name: Engine proxy
phases.exitGate: Control plane proxies REST and WebSocket traffic to the private engine.

phases.name: Frontend creation flow
phases.exitGate: Naming step lets the user choose Local or Cloud 24/7 without a new UI.

phases.name: Provider login in cloud
phases.exitGate: Claude/Codex/Gemini auth happens against the cloud engine and persists in its volume.

phases.name: Cloud sharing
phases.exitGate: Cloud agent owner can share access with another user and revoke it.

phases.name: VPS production hardening
phases.exitGate: Only the control plane is public, engines are private, backups and logs exist.

phases.name: K3s migration
phases.exitGate: Runtime backend can provision the same cloud agent contract on K3s.

features.description: Store and enforce subscription entitlement for cloud agents.
acceptance: inactive users cannot create cloud agents

features.description: Validate Supabase JWT and resolve user, organization and role.
Persist cloud agent metadata, runtime state and share rows.
acceptance: cloud agent list is filtered by user

features.description: Provision one private houston-engine container and volume per cloud agent.
acceptance: container does not publish host port

features.description: Create a cloud agent through POST /v1/cloud/agents.
acceptance: rolls back metadata if provisioning fails

features.description: Proxy authorized REST calls from control plane to the private engine.
Bridge WebSocket frames between Houston App and cloud engine.
Add runtime mode to Agent and CreateAgent types.
Add Local vs Cloud 24/7 selector to the existing naming/color step.
acceptance: selector appears in normal create flow
selector appears in AI create flow

features.description: Add frontend client for cloud control plane using the signed-in Supabase session.
acceptance: surfaces errors through existing toast path

features.description: Route agent operations to local engine or cloud proxy based on agent.runtime.
acceptance: cloud agents activate watcher scheduler and WS like local

features.description: Keep CLI harness parity for cloud agents and provider API keys. API keys inject env at spawn; they do not replace terminal-manager.
acceptance: setCurrent and create call activateAgentRuntime for cloud and local
provider prefs and status resolve through current agent engine
openrouter and dual-path api keys still spawn codex or claude
docs state api key is not http-only loop

features.description: Run provider status and login flows against the cloud agent engine.
acceptance: Codex device auth works in cloud
Gemini API key persists in cloud volume

features.description: Share a live cloud agent with another user using existing share surfaces.
Persist audit records for cloud agent creation, proxy access, sharing and denied access.
Deploy control plane, Postgres, TLS and Docker runtime on the VPS.
Add K3s runtime backend behind the same cloud agent contract.
